352.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
352.description: Ghost hunters share the stories that led them to a career in the paranormal. A woman claims she used to experience nightly visits from a horned demon.

390.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
390.description: A father and son come face-to-face with what they believe is the ghost of a screaming girl. Plus, a teenager claims to hear the whispers of sinister spirits.

409.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
409.description: A father and son come face-to-face with what they believe is the ghost of a screaming girl. Plus, a teenager claims to hear the whispers of sinister spirits.

7097.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
7097.description: A brother and sister believe they have been chased by a shadow figure. Plus, a family report ghostly whispers and mournful serenades in their new home.

7116.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
7116.description: A brother and sister believe they have been chased by a shadow figure. Plus, a family report ghostly whispers and mournful serenades in their new home.

7135.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
7135.description: People share their experiences with destructive spirits. A young girl fears a poltergeist and a boy claims to be terrorised by a shadow man.

7154.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
7154.description: People share their experiences with destructive spirits. A young girl fears a poltergeist and a boy claims to be terrorised by a shadow man.
